name: graphVariants
label: Run a graph recipe (typosquat variants)
description: Run the Whisper catalog recipe 'Typosquat Variant Generator' (whisper.variants): generate look-alike domain variants of a brand and see which are actually registered - bit-squats, homoglyphs, omissions, and more. A direct Cypher read, bound server-side as a $-parameter. Keyless - no API key needed. Catalog: github.com/whisper-sec/whisper-catalog.
